name: PaLM 2
note: Powered Bard in 2023; basis for Med-PaLM 2 and Codey; PaLM API decommissioned Aug 15 2024.

results.notes: PaLM 2-L on BIG-Bench Hard, as reported in PaLM 2 Technical Report (Table 6), 3-shot CoT

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: announced by Sundar Pichai at Google I/O on 2023-05-10 (blog.google, TechCrunch, Axios all corroborate). Technical report (arXiv 2305.10403) submitted 2023-05-17, matching evaluatedAt. Fetched full-text (ar5iv) Table 6: PaLM 2-L scores exactly 78.1 on BBH 3-shot CoT vs PaLM's 65.2 -- score confirmed verbatim. PaLM API decommission date of Aug 15 2024 corroborated independently. Params were never disclosed by Google (kept null, correctly).
